classes.reasoning: This is a published systematic review article from the 'Journal of Precision Oncology' (Volume 6, 2022) with DOI 10.1200/PO.21.00500, complete with abstract, methods, results, discussion, and references sections. It is peer-reviewed academic literature, not a trial artifact.

indication: EGFR-mutant advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC)
summary: This is a systematic review article published in the Journal of Precision Oncology in March 2022, synthesizing molecular resistance mechanisms to osimertinib (a third-generation EGFR inhibitor) in non-small cell lung cancer. The review analyzed 47 studies encompassing 3,218 patients to characterize the heterogeneous landscape of osimertinib resistance and guide treatment selection.
references_to: Soria JC et al. Osimertinib in untreated EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC. N Engl J Med. 2018;378:113-25
Ramalingam SS et al. Overall survival with osimertinib in untreated, EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC. N Engl J Med. 2020;382:41-50
Leonetti A et al. Resistance mechanisms to osimertinib in EGFR-mutated NSCLC. Br J Cancer. 2019;121:725-37
